commonPrompt: Create original premium key art for a desktop coding workspace theme. Use contemporary Chinese animation background painting, refined ink-wash atmosphere, mineral-pigment color, cinematic depth, and precise environmental detail. The result must be a new composition, not an imitation of any named artist, studio, series, game, film, character, or franchise. Keep the entire left 46 percent calm and low contrast for readable interface controls. Put the main visual story in the right third. Keep important content inside the middle 82 percent vertically because the source will be cropped to 16:9. No text, letters, numbers, logo, watermark, signature, interface, border, frame, mockup, diptych, or split panel. No photorealism. Landscape 3:2.
fanArtPrompt: Create premium unofficial fan-art key art for a desktop coding workspace theme. Depict only the declared work and characters in the scene brief, with recognizable canonical identity and signature props, but make a completely new composition rather than copying any official still, poster, key visual, camera angle, or promotional asset. Use polished cinematic Chinese fantasy animation rendering with refined ink atmosphere, mineral-pigment color, dimensional lighting, and believable materials; do not imitate a named artist or studio's signature style. Keep the entire left 46 percent calm, low contrast, and mostly environmental for readable interface controls. Put the main characters or scene action in the right third. Keep faces, bodies, and important action inside the middle 82 percent vertically because the source will be cropped to 16:9. No text, title, letters, numbers, logo, watermark, signature, interface, border, frame, mockup, diptych, split panel, or copied franchise emblem. No photorealism. Landscape 3:2.

jobs.prompt: A vast sea of ink-green mountain ridges at cool dawn. A circular moon gate is half hidden in cloud on a high terrace, with one tiny anonymous robed traveler following a winding pale path toward it. Layered atmospheric perspective, celadon mist, restrained jade light, quiet scale, sophisticated environmental storytelling.

An entirely original chibi mountain apprentice with a round expressive face, moss-green travel robe, tiny topknot, and warm paper lantern. The small figure waits beside a weathered stone path under oversized fern leaves and misty ridges. Charming but finely painted, natural pose, believable materials, no resemblance to an existing character.

A cobalt celestial wilderness where a narrow red-lit route cuts across floating stone observatories and deep constellations. One tiny anonymous wanderer moves against the flow of luminous star trails. Grand cosmic scale, restrained vermilion accent, dark blue mineral pigments, elegant rather than neon-heavy.

An entirely original chibi star spirit in a midnight-blue robe rides a small comet through a quiet indigo sky. The character has a simple round silhouette, curious expression, and a tiny cloth satchel filled with softly glowing star seeds. Fine painted cloud wisps and constellations, playful but not toy-like.

Monumental black-ink peaks emerge from pale warm mist while one clean vermilion sword-light arcs between cliffs. A tiny anonymous swordsman stands on a narrow right-side ridge, cloak moving in the wind. Modern book-cover restraint, forceful brush texture, negative space, dramatic scale, no calligraphy.

An entirely original chibi sword apprentice practices one careful stroke on a quiet mountain platform at sunrise. The child wears a charcoal training robe with a muted red sash and holds a plain wooden practice sword. Huge sun, layered ink peaks, earnest expression, warm humor, refined animation background quality.

A pale jade cloud sea with floating islands, hanging gardens, and slender stone bridges. On the far-right island, an anonymous traveler meets an original translucent wind creature shaped from ribbons of light, with no familiar animal mascot design. Airy spiritual atmosphere, luminous mineral green, intricate architecture.

An entirely original soft chibi cloud creature naps on a broad floating leaf above a deep sea of mist. It has a simple rounded body, tiny folded ears unlike any known mascot, sleepy expression, and a small jade bell. Floating seed pods and distant islands add depth. Cozy, polished, subtle, not plastic or sticker-like.

A quiet invented northern city neighborhood at winter dawn, seen from a modest rooftop rather than a tourist viewpoint. A long pedestrian line passes low gray courtyard roofs, bare scholar trees, brick walls, bicycles, and a distant band of ordinary rectangular office buildings. Clear blue air and the first amber light. Evoke Beijing through climate, scale, and spatial order. Do not show any palace, gate tower, ceremonial monument, famous skyline building, CCTV Headquarters, China Zun, Tiananmen, Temple of Heaven, landmark, or tourist panorama.

A contemporary invented river metropolis at blue hour, seen close to the water from a low embankment. Layered ferry wakes, restrained rose-gold reflections, Art Deco stone warehouse facades, brick lane-house textures, plane trees, and clean vertical glass slabs fill the right side. Urban animation background painting, grounded and contemporary, with no fantasy architecture and no traditional pagoda roofs. Evoke Shanghai through river rhythm, material contrast, and density. Do not show the Bund, Oriental Pearl Tower, Shanghai Tower, World Financial Center, Jin Mao Tower, or any exact skyline landmark.

A fast subtropical rainstorm crosses an invented high-tech city of terraced greenery, cool glass towers, elevated walkways, and a subtle leaf-like circuit pattern in reflected light. Electric cyan is controlled by deep forest green. Evoke Shenzhen through speed, rain, and new urban growth, with no corporate logo.

Warm evening air moves across an invented southern riverfront city. Banyan branches, arcade shadows, curved bridge light, ferry ripples, and a soft amber skyline form layered depth. Evoke Guangzhou through humid river atmosphere and Lingnan spatial cues without an exact landmark or city symbol.

Fine summer rain around an intimate Sichuan teahouse courtyard. Bamboo shadows cross tiled eaves, tea steam catches muted amber light, and a narrow garden path disappears into lush green. Evoke Chengdu through pace, weather, and teahouse culture. No panda, mascot, logo, or famous site.

A pale lake after rain with a long causeway, distant wooded hills, lotus marks, small boats, and one folded paper letter resting beneath a waterside pavilion. Evoke Hangzhou through water, mist, and garden rhythm without copying a famous view. Pearl gray, celadon, and a restrained warm lantern.

An invented mountain city stacked across steep river slopes at night. Layers of stairs, bridges, cliffside windows, mist, and one bright transit line turn extreme depth into a clear visual rhythm. Evoke Chongqing through vertical movement and river reflection, without reproducing a famous building or viewpoint.

A quiet winter city edge with broad old brick wall courses, plum branches, river mist, and distant modern roofs. One restrained cinnabar blossom cluster holds the right side while cool gray masonry recedes into fog. Evoke Nanjing through history, winter, and river atmosphere without an exact monument.

work.en: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality

jobs.prompt: Unofficial fan art for 《凡人修仙传》 featuring 韩立 and 南宫婉. Place both full-body characters on the far-right side of a high stone cultivation terrace at misty dawn. Han Li has a calm, restrained expression, long dark hair tied back, a practical deep-blue cultivation robe, a storage pouch, and a faintly glowing small green bottle at his belt. Nangong Wan wears an elegant pale ivory and cool-blue layered robe with subtle silver ornaments, long black hair, and a poised but warm gaze. They stand several steps apart, looking toward each other rather than posing for a poster. Distant green mountains, a quiet formation circle, drifting medicinal petals, restrained jade and moon-white light.

work.en: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality

jobs.prompt: Unofficial chibi fan art for 《凡人修仙传》 featuring Q-version 韩立 and 南宫婉 as two complete, polished miniature figures on the right. Han Li carefully protects a tiny luminous green bottle while checking a miniature herb garden; he wears a simplified deep-blue robe and storage pouches. Nangong Wan kneels beside him in a pale ivory-blue robe, holding a small spirit herb and smiling with composed amusement. Oversized leaves, tiny formation stones, soft mountain mist, jade and warm cream palette, expressive faces, refined 3D-animation materials, not sticker-like.

Unofficial fan art for 《仙逆》 featuring 王林 and 李慕婉. On the right side beneath a cold indigo sky, Wang Lin stands in a dark black-and-gray robe with long black hair, a severe quiet face, and a faint red spiritual light circling one hand. Li Muwan stands close but not touching, in a pale blue-white robe with delicate alchemist details, holding a small warm lantern shaped like a pill furnace. Wind moves their sleeves while a distant ruined cultivation city and bare branches fade into snow mist. The emotional contrast is relentless cold around one protected warm light.

Unofficial chibi fan art for 《仙逆》 featuring Q-version 王林 and 李慕婉 inside a tiny woodcarving shop on the right. Wang Lin, in a simplified charcoal robe and long dark hair, concentrates intensely on carving a small wooden figure. Li Muwan, in a pale blue-white robe, tends a round glowing pill furnace and places a cup of tea near him. A few finished woodcarvings, snow outside the window, indigo shadows, one amber pool of light, charming expressions but emotionally grounded, polished miniature materials.

Unofficial fan art for 《剑来》 featuring 陈平安 and 宁姚. On the far-right of a rain-cleared small-town road, Chen Ping'an walks in simple dark-brown travel clothes and straw sandals, carrying a plain sword case and a cloth bundle, with a sincere steady expression. Ning Yao walks half a step ahead in a clean dark-red and black swordswoman outfit, long dark hair tied high, one hand resting near her sword as she turns back toward him. Whitewashed walls, wet bluestone, distant ink mountains, a road opening beyond the town, restrained cinnabar and parchment colors.

Unofficial chibi fan art for 《剑来》 featuring Q-version 陈平安 and 宁姚 on the right side of a tiny bluestone town lane. Chen Ping'an leans forward under an oversized plain sword case, dressed in humble brown travel clothes and straw sandals, earnest and slightly flustered. Ning Yao, in a simplified dark-red swordswoman outfit with a high ponytail, points confidently toward the mountain road while holding her sword. Small white walls, a paper umbrella, puddle reflections, warm window light, polished chibi animation rendering.

Unofficial fan art for 《斗破苍穹》 featuring 萧炎 and 美杜莎（彩鳞）. Place them on the right side of a desert ruin at twilight. Xiao Yan wears a fitted black martial robe with red accents, carries the massive dark Xuan Heavy Ruler behind one shoulder, and holds a controlled green-blue heavenly flame. Medusa stands beside him in an elegant violet-crimson queen's battle dress with gold serpent jewelry, long dark hair, commanding eyes, and a restrained translucent purple serpent aura. Windblown sand, broken stone, green flame versus violet energy, cinematic partnership rather than a promotional pose.

Unofficial chibi fan art for 《斗破苍穹》 featuring Q-version 萧炎 and 美杜莎（彩鳞） on the right. Xiao Yan in a small black-and-red martial robe struggles to balance a glowing two-color fire lotus while an oversized dark heavy ruler lies behind him. Medusa, in a simplified violet-crimson queen outfit with gold serpent ornaments, watches with an unimpressed expression while a tiny purple serpent curls around her arm. Miniature desert stones, green and violet glow, highly polished chibi materials, complete figures, playful but not plastic.

work.en: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality

jobs.prompt: Unofficial fan-art memory scene for 《凡人修仙传》: 虚天殿. Compose a completely new wide view rather than recreating an official shot. The left half is quiet ice fog and monumental shadow. On the right, 韩立 in a practical deep-blue cultivation robe walks with several tiny distant cultivator silhouettes up immense translucent ice steps toward a colossal ancient hall door. Frozen chains, blue-white spiritual light, black stone, deep vertical scale, crisp architectural detail, mysterious danger, Han Li identifiable by his restrained robe, tied dark hair, storage pouch, and subtle green-bottle glow.

Unofficial fan-art memory scene for 《仙逆》: 王林抢婚. Create a new camera angle from outside a mountain wedding hall during a sudden snowstorm. The calm left side holds pale snow and distant dark roofs. On the right, red wedding silk and lanterns whip into the air as 王林 descends above the steps in a dark robe, long black hair and cold red spiritual light, while 李慕婉 in ceremonial red-and-white layers turns upward from the hall entrance. The image should feel like one uncompromising arrival splitting warm ceremony from cold sky, with no readable wedding characters or symbols.

Unofficial fan-art memory scene for 《剑来》: 陈平安向宁姚告白. Make a new intimate composition in a quiet small-town lane after rain. Keep the left half as empty wet bluestone, soft wall shadows, and mist. On the right, 陈平安 in humble dark-brown clothes and straw sandals stands very straight, nervous but completely sincere, facing 宁姚. Ning Yao wears a dark-red swordswoman outfit, holds her sword against one shoulder, and looks back with surprised warmth. One amber window, pale rain light, white walls, restrained emotion, no text or romantic typography.

Unofficial fan-art memory scene for 《斗破苍穹》: 三年之约. Compose a fresh wide view of a high mountain arena rather than copying an official shot. Leave the left half as pale cloud, worn stone, and distant sect terraces. On the right, 萧炎 in a black-and-red martial robe stands with the massive dark Xuan Heavy Ruler and green-blue heavenly flame facing 纳兰嫣然 in a pale cyan-and-white sword robe with a long narrow sword and wind energy. Broken arena tiles lift between them, cloud bands cut across the mountain, and their opposing silhouettes carry the full weight of the promised duel. No sect logos, banners, or readable symbols.
